message.content:
@startuml
left to right direction
actor Admin
participant "AddEventPage" as AddEventPage
participant "AddEventFormContainer" as AddEventFormContainer
participant "AddClassPopupContainer" as AddClassPopupContainer
participant "ClassForm" as ClassForm
participant "ClassService (Frontend)" as ClassServiceFrontend
participant "ShiftService (Frontend)" as ShiftServiceFrontend
participant "Router" as Router
participant "ClassHTTPTransport" as ClassHTTPTransport
participant "ClassEndpoint" as ClassEndpoint
participant "ClassService" as ClassService
participant "ClassCommand" as ClassCommand
participant "ClassQuery" as ClassQuery
participant "TransactionGRPCTransport" as TransactionGRPCTransport
participant "StorageGRPC Transport" as StorageGRPCTransport
participant "MaterialService" as MaterialService
participant "NatsStreaming" as NatsStreaming

Admin -> AddEventPage: Click "Attach New Class" Button
AddEventPage -> AddEventFormContainer: attach(Class())
AddEventFormContainer -> AddClassPopupContainer: attach
AddEventFormContainer -> AddClassPopupContainer: attach
AddEventPage -> AddClassPopupContainer: Render "Add Class Popup" Container
AddClassPopupContainer -> ClassForm: render
ClassForm --> AddClassPopupContainer: rendered
AddEventPage -> AddClassPopupContainer: choose date
AddClassPopupContainer -> ClassForm: handleDateChange(value)
ClassForm -> ShiftServiceFrontend: fetchAvailableShifts(date)
ShiftServiceFrontend --> ClassForm: shifts
AddEventPage -> AddClassPopupContainer: form data
AddEventPage -> AddClassPopupContainer: choose shift
AddClassPopupContainer -> ClassForm: handleShiftChange()
ClassForm -> ShiftServiceFrontend: fetchAvailableShifts(date, {shift})
ShiftServiceFrontend --> ClassForm: rooms
AddEventPage -> AddClassPopupContainer: form data
AddEventPage -> AddClassPopupContainer: Fill Form
AddEventPage -> AddClassPopupContainer: form data
AddEventPage -> AddClassPopupContainer: Click "Create Class" Button
AddClassPopupContainer -> AddClassPopupContainer: handleClassFormSubmitted()
AddClassPopupContainer -> ClassHTTPTransport: booking(Class(payload))
ClassHTTPTransport -> ClassEndpoint: route("GET", "/v2/booking")
ClassEndpoint -> ClassService: BookingClass(ClassService, {ServerOption})
ClassService -> ClassService: Booking(ClassService, withPaginated)
ClassService -> ClassService: Create(context, params)
ClassService -> ClassService: Validate()

alt "Data Valid"
  ClassService -> TransactionGRPCTransport: IsValidTransaction(ProtoBuffer)
  TransactionGRPCTransport --> ClassService: ProtoResponse

  alt "Is Valid Transaction"
    ClassService -> ClassService: class := ClassModel()
    ClassService -> ClassService: Create(context, class)
    ClassService -> ClassService: uuid

    opt "Has materials"
      ClassService -> MaterialService: CommitFile(context, ProtoBuffer)
      ClassService -> MaterialService: link
      ClassService -> MaterialService: Create(context, payload)
      ClassService -> MaterialService: IsCreated
    end

    ClassService -> ClassQuery: FindContext({SliceConditions})
    ClassQuery --> ClassService: classes
    ClassService -> NatsStreaming: publishClassCreated(context, data)
    NatsStreaming --> ClassService: published
  end
end

ClassService -> ClassEndpoint: BadRequest
ClassEndpoint -> ClassHTTPTransport: BadRequest
ClassHTTPTransport -> AddClassPopupContainer: BadRequest
AddClassPopupContainer -> AddEventPage: BadRequest

ClassService -> ClassEndpoint: UnprocessableEntity
ClassEndpoint -> ClassHTTPTransport: UnprocessableEntity
ClassHTTPTransport -> AddClassPopupContainer: UnprocessableEntity
AddClassPopupContainer -> AddEventPage: UnprocessableEntity

ClassService -> ClassService: class := Response(class, nil)
ClassService -> ClassHTTPTransport: response
ClassHTTPTransport -> ClassEndpoint: response
ClassEndpoint -> ClassHTTPTransport: response
ClassHTTPTransport -> AddClassPopupContainer: response
AddClassPopupContainer -> AddEventPage: response

@enduml
